news.t: Tuttle Capital's SPAC and New Issue ETF to Change Ticker to "SPCK"
First Pure-Play De-SPAC ETFs Launch on the NYSE
The SPAC and New Issue ETF (SPCX) Surpasses $25 million AUM
Citi Expands ETF Services with Support of First Actively Managed SPAC ETF

holdings.infoBox: SPCK is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings.

overview.description: The SPAC and New Issue ETF (SPCK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund that aims to provide a broad exposure to Special Purpose Acquisitions Corporations (SPACs) and newly-listed firms. SPCK was launched on Dec 15, 2020 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.

data.title: Tuttle Capital's SPAC and New Issue ETF to Change Ticker to "SPCK"
data.text: Riverside, Connecticut--(Newsfile Corp. - April 7, 2026) - Tuttle Capital Management, a pioneer in thematic exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced a ticker symbol change for The SPAC and New Is...

data.title: ETF Edge, July 12, 2021
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani tracks the latest headlines in exchange-traded funds with WisdomTree's Jeremy Schwartz, WallachBeth Capital's Andrew McOrmond and Morgan Creek Capital Management's Mark Yusko.

data.title: First Pure-Play De-SPAC ETFs Launch on the NYSE
data.text: NEW YORK, May 19, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- The De-SPAC ETF (NYSE: DSPC) and The Short De-SPAC ETF (NYSE: SOGU) start trading on the New York Stock Exchange today. They are the first ETFs to offer pure-pla...

data.title: Unpacking the newest SPAC ETF with the man behind its launch
data.text: Mark Yusko, CEO, chief investment officer and founder of Morgan Creek Capital Management, discusses his firm's latest SPAC ETF. With Morningstar's Ben Johnson and CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: Behind the new actively-managed SPAC ETF launch
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani talks with Mark Yusko of Morgan Creek Capital Management about the new SPAC ETF, SPXZ.

data.title: The SPAC and New Issue ETF (SPCX) Surpasses $25 million AUM
data.text: NEW YORK, Jan. 6, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- The SPAC and New Issue ETF (NYSE: SPCX) announced that it has eclipsed $25 million in assets under management (AUM) over the course of thirteen trading days. SPC...

data.title: Citi Expands ETF Services with Support of First Actively Managed SPAC ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citi has expanded its ETF Fund Services franchise with its support of the first actively managed Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC) ETF from Tuttle Tactical Manageme...
